overall.description: Gameplay footage from a third-person perspective showing a white-haired character riding a horse along a scenic coastline, passing a wooden fishing hut, and continuing into a dense pine forest. The journey transitions from an open pebble beach with large rock formations to a narrow, winding forest trail with dappled sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rocky coastline with pebble beach

agents.ego_description: riding a horse along the coastline, moving away from large rock formations toward a distant settlement

entered.detail: tall rocky outcrop rising from the water near the shore
grey shingle beach stretching along the waterline
tree-covered cliffs rising in the distance along the coast
tranquil blue water with gentle waves lapping the shore
scattered logs and debris washed up on the beach
weathered wooden posts sticking out of the water near shore

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide coastal landscape with a pebble beach stretching along calm waters. Large rock formations rise from the sea on the right while forested cliffs line the left horizon. The character rides steadily forward along the shore, passing driftwood and approaching wooden dock posts in the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal fishing hut with wooden dock

events.description: passing the wooden fishing hut and turning inland away from the water

agents.ego_description: riding past a small wooden hut and turning onto an inland path away from the coast

entered.detail: small rustic cabin with thatched roof and wooden walls
weathered wooden platform extending into the water
wooden barrels stacked near the hut entrance
rope strung between posts with hanging fabric
weathered wooden sign at the path junction

segments.scene_description: The rider approaches a small wooden fishing hut with a thatched roof and a simple dock extending into the water. Barrels and a clothesline sit near the structure. The horse turns left around the hut, passing a wooden signpost as the path turns inland away from the coast, leaving the beach behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest trail through tall pine trees

events.description: entering dense pine forest from coastal area

agents.ego_description: riding uphill through a dense pine forest on a narrow dirt trail, navigating between trees and rocks

entered.detail: dense forest of tall evergreen trees with straight trunks
narrow winding trail of packed earth and gravel
massive boulders and rocky outcrops alongside the path
simple wooden fence posts lining the trail edge
decaying tree trunks lying beside the path

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a dense pine forest with a narrow dirt trail winding between tall trees. The path is flanked by large rock outcrops and occasional wooden fences. Sunlight filters through the canopy creating dappled shadows on the ground as the rider continues deeper into the woodland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, breezy coastline into the secluded depths of a dense pine forest. It begins with the rider moving steadily along a wide pebble beach, passing driftwood and large rock formations that rise from the calm sea. As the camera approaches a small wooden fishing hut with a thatched roof and a simple dock, the horse turns left around the structure and a wooden signpost, leaving the shore behind. The scene then shifts as the open landscape narrows into a winding dirt trail flanked by rock outcrops and wooden fences. Finally, the environment transforms into a thick woodland where sunlight filters through the high canopy to create dappled shadows on the ground.
